Note.title: Working Board Note
Note.description: Sticky notes dragged, pinned, and organized on the bulletin board.

text.description: The textual body or memo of the sticky note.

color.description: CSS and tailwind color styles for the card.

x.description: Horizontal position in pixels on the board.

y.description: Vertical position in pixels on the board.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the sticky note was drafted.

Photo.title: Album Photo Snapshot
Photo.description: A high-fidelity photo record snapshot of the day compiled in the shared slideshow and photo album.

url.description: Direct image data or web link URL of the photo.

downloads.description: Visual record of click download events.

/notes/{noteId}.description: Shared real-time bulletin board sticky note document.

/photos/{photoId}.description: Shared physical snap album records library.
